title: Span
description: A Zipkin span represents an individual unit of work in a distributed trace.

traceId.description: Unique 128-bit or 64-bit trace identifier, hex encoded

parentId.description: The parent span ID, hex encoded, absent if root span

name.description: The logical operation this span represents

timestamp.description: Epoch microseconds of the start of this span

duration.description: Duration in microseconds of the critical path

annotations.description: Events that explain latency with a timestamp

debug.description: True if this span was sampled with debug flag

shared.description: True if this span ID is shared between client and server
